creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to László Károlyi from comment #68)

> I get no overriding message in dmesg

Loader messages do not get to the dmesg buffer. Instead, use "kldstat -v" to verify that module is loaded. And you cannot load the module after kernel version is activated (registered), so use /boot/loader.conf or /boot/nextboot.conf
